template: SELECT c.CustomerID, c.AccountNumber, s.Name AS CompanyName FROM Sales_Customer c INNER JOIN Sales_Store s ON c.StoreID = s.BusinessEntityID WHERE s.Name = "{Sales_Store_Name}"
description: Find customer information given a company name.

template: SELECT p.Name AS ProductName, s.Name AS CompanyName FROM Production_ProductModel pm INNER JOIN Production_Product p ON pm.ProductModelID = p.ProductModelID INNER JOIN Sales_SalesOrderDetail sod ON p.ProductID = sod.ProductID INNER JOIN Sales_SalesOrderHeader soh ON sod.SalesOrderID = soh.SalesOrderID INNER JOIN Sales_Customer c ON soh.CustomerID = c.CustomerID INNER JOIN Sales_Store s ON c.StoreID = s.BusinessEntityID WHERE pm.Name = "{Production_ProductModel_Name}"
description: List product name and company name for all customers who ordered a given product model.

template: SELECT p.FirstName, p.LastName, e.JobTitle FROM HumanResources_Department d INNER JOIN HumanResources_EmployeeDepartmentHistory edh ON d.DepartmentID = edh.DepartmentID INNER JOIN HumanResources_Employee e ON edh.BusinessEntityID = e.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person_Person p ON e.BusinessEntityID = p.BusinessEntityID WHERE d.Name = "{HumanResources_Department_Name}"
description: Find all employees in a department by name with their first name and last name and job title.

template: SELECT p.FirstName, p.LastName, e.JobTitle, e.SickLeaveHours FROM HumanResources_Employee e INNER JOIN Person_Person p ON e.BusinessEntityID = p.BusinessEntityID WHERE e.SickLeaveHours > {rand_medium_pos_number}
description: Find all employees with sick leave hours above a given threshold.

template: SELECT p.FirstName, p.LastName, e.JobTitle FROM HumanResources_Employee e INNER JOIN Person_Person p ON e.BusinessEntityID = p.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person_BusinessEntityAddress bea ON e.BusinessEntityID = bea.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person_Address a ON bea.AddressID = a.AddressID WHERE a.City = "{Person_Address_City}"
description: Find all employees living in a given city.

template: SELECT * FROM HumanResources_Employee WHERE JobTitle = "{HumanResources_Employee_JobTitle}"
description: Find all employees with a given job title.

template: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ItemsSold FROM Sales_SalesOrderDetail sod INNER JOIN Production_Product p ON sod.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE p.ListPrice > {Production_Product_ListPrice}
description: Find how many items with a list price above a given amount have been sold.

template: SELECT p.Name AS ProductName, sod.OrderQty FROM Sales_SalesOrderDetail sod INNER JOIN Production_Product p ON sod.ProductID = p.ProductID INNER JOIN Sales_SalesOrderHeader soh ON sod.SalesOrderID = soh.SalesOrderID INNER JOIN Sales_Customer c ON soh.CustomerID = c.CustomerID INNER JOIN Sales_Store s ON c.StoreID = s.BusinessEntityID WHERE s.Name = "{Sales_Store_Name}"
description: List product name and quantity ordered by a given company.

template: SELECT s.Name AS CompanyName, SUM(soh.TotalDue) AS TotalSpent FROM Sales_SalesOrderHeader soh INNER JOIN Sales_Customer c ON soh.CustomerID = c.CustomerID INNER JOIN Sales_Store s ON c.StoreID = s.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Sales_SalesTerritory t ON c.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID WHERE t.Name = "{Sales_SalesTerritory_Name}" GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY TotalSpent DESC LIMIT 1
description: Find the best customer in a given sales territory.

template: SELECT v.Name AS VendorName, v.AccountNumber FROM Purchasing_Vendor v INNER JOIN Purchasing_ProductVendor pv ON v.BusinessEntityID = pv.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Production_Product p ON pv.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE p.Name = "{Production_Product_Name}"
description: List all vendors supplying a given product.

template: SELECT p.FirstName, p.LastName, SUM(soh.TotalDue) AS TotalRevenue FROM Sales_SalesOrderHeader soh INNER JOIN Sales_SalesPerson sp ON soh.SalesPersonID = sp.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person_Person p ON sp.BusinessEntityID = p.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Sales_SalesTerritory t ON sp.TerritoryID = t.TerritoryID WHERE t.Name = "{Sales_SalesTerritory_Name}" GROUP BY p.FirstName, p.LastName
description: Get total sales revenue per salesperson in a given territory.

template: SELECT p.Name AS ProductName, pr.ReviewerName, pr.Rating, pr.Comments FROM Production_Product p INNER JOIN Production_ProductSubcategory ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = ps.ProductSubcategoryID INNER JOIN Production_ProductReview pr ON p.ProductID = pr.ProductID WHERE ps.Name = "{Production_ProductSubcategory_Name}"
description: List products in a given subcategory with their reviews.

template: SELECT YEAR(OrderDate) AS SalesYear, MONTH(OrderDate) AS SalesMonth, COUNT(*) AS OrderCount, SUM(TotalDue) AS TotalSales FROM Sales_SalesOrderHeader WHERE TerritoryID = {Sales_SalesOrderHeader_TerritoryID} GROUP BY YEAR(OrderDate), MONTH(OrderDate) ORDER BY SalesYear, SalesMonth
description: Get monthly sales summary for a given territory.

template: SELECT p.ProductID, p.Name AS ProductName, SUM(sod.OrderQty) AS UnitsSold, SUM(sod.LineTotal) AS Revenue FROM Sales_SalesOrderDetail sod INNER JOIN Production_Product p ON sod.ProductID = p.ProductID INNER JOIN Production_ProductSubcategory ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryID = ps.ProductSubcategoryID WHERE ps.Name = "{Production_ProductSubcategory_Name}" GROUP BY p.ProductID, p.Name ORDER BY Revenue DESC LIMIT 25
description: Top 25 best-selling products in a given subcategory.

template: SELECT p.Name AS ProductName, SUM(pi.Quantity) AS TotalStock FROM Production_ProductInventory pi INNER JOIN Production_Product p ON pi.ProductID = p.ProductID GROUP BY p.Name HAVING SUM(pi.Quantity) < {rand_medium_pos_number}
description: List products with total inventory below a given threshold.

template: SELECT p.BusinessEntityID, p.FirstName, p.LastName, pw.PasswordHash FROM Person_Person p INNER JOIN Person_EmailAddress ea ON p.BusinessEntityID = ea.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person_Password pw ON p.BusinessEntityID = pw.BusinessEntityID WHERE ea.EmailAddress = "{Person_EmailAddress_EmailAddress}"
description: Login by email address and retrieve password hash.

template: SELECT e.BusinessEntityID, p.FirstName, p.LastName, pw.PasswordHash FROM HumanResources_Employee e INNER JOIN Person_Person p ON e.BusinessEntityID = p.BusinessEntityID INNER JOIN Person_Password pw ON e.BusinessEntityID = pw.BusinessEntityID WHERE e.LoginID = "{HumanResources_Employee_LoginID}"
description: Login by employee LoginID and retrieve password hash.

template: SELECT p.FirstName, p.LastName, p.PersonType, ea.EmailAddress, pp.PhoneNumber FROM Person_Person p LEFT JOIN Person_EmailAddress ea ON p.BusinessEntityID = ea.BusinessEntityID LEFT JOIN Person_PersonPhone pp ON p.BusinessEntityID = pp.BusinessEntityID WHERE p.BusinessEntityID = {Person_Person_BusinessEntityID}
description: Get user profile details by BusinessEntityID.

template: SELECT COUNT(*) AS EmailExists FROM Person_EmailAddress WHERE EmailAddress = "{Person_EmailAddress_EmailAddress}"
description: Check if an email address already exists.

template: SELECT c.CustomerID, c.PersonID, c.StoreID, c.TerritoryID FROM Sales_Customer c WHERE c.AccountNumber = "{Sales_Customer_AccountNumber}"
description: Retrieve customer account by account number.

template: SELECT ProductID FROM Production_Product WHERE {conditions}
description: Search products using a flexible set of filter conditions.
